features: ✅ EFFECTIVE - Puratise Hand Sanitizer Gel is 99.99% Effective Against Germs & Bacteria, Making it the Antibacterial Hand Sanitizer of Choice for Many, Including Medical Settings, Schools and Work Places.

✅ 70% ALCOHOL HAND SANITISER - Puratise Alcohol Hand Sanitiser is Made up of Isopropyl Alcohol 75.2%, Aqua, Glycerin and Hostagel. The High Alcohol Content of Our Anti Bac Hand Gel Makes it Ideal for any Setting Where Controlling the Spread of Bacteria is Important.
✅ 5L HAND SANITISER - Puratise 5 Litre Hand Sanitiser Gel Meets all EU Regulations and is Made Here in the UK.

✅ NO WATER REQUIRED - Hand Gel is Vital for the Control of Spreading Bacteria, Especially in Environments Where There is no Water. Our Hand Sanitizer Gel Alcohol UK Formula Requires No Water and Instantly Kills Germs & Bacteria on Contact!
✅ CUSTOMER SATISFACTION GUARANTEED - If You Are Not Satisfied With Your Purchase of Puratise Hand Sanitiser 5L for Any Reason, Please Contact Us.
description: Melbec microbiology approved and tested in accordance with BSEN 1276:2019 & BSEN1500:2013 Contents: Hand Gel Antibacterial - 5 Litre Hand Sanitiser Gel Alcohol Content 70% How to use No water required. Apply to hands and rub in. Ensure there is contact with finger nails and in between fingers. Puratise Sanitizer Hand Gel can be used on Hands and/or Body. Warning: Do not use alcohol gel on damaged, sensitive or irritated skin. Avoid contact with the eyes. Do not use on damaged, sensitive or irritated skin. Adult supervision required for child use. Highly flammable liquid and vapour. Keep away from heat/ sparks/ open flames/ hot surfaces. No Smoking. Ingredients Isopropyl Alcohol 75.2%, Aqua, Glycerin, Hostagel Classification: - according to Regulation (EC) No. 1907/2006 (REACH) with its amendment Regulation (EU) 2015/830 - accordance with Commission Regulation (EU) No 453/2010 - accordance with Commission Regulation (EC) No 1272/2008 IMPORTANT: PLEASE NOTE THE COLOUR OF THE CANISTER MAY DIFFER FROM IMAGES. STRONGER CANISTERS ARE USED WHEN SHIPPING TO ENSURE NO DAMAGE IN TRANSIT Ingredients 70% Isopropanol Alcohol, Aqua (Distilled Water), Glycerol (Glycerin), Ammonium Acryloyl Dimethyl Taurate/VP Copolymer (Hostagel) IMPORTANT: PLEASE NOTE THE COLOUR OF THE CANISTER MAY DIFFER FROM IMAGES. STRONGER CANISTERS ARE USED WHEN SHIPPING TO ENSURE NO DAMAGE IN TRANSIT. IMPORTANT: Made to BSEN1276 standards and in ISO 9001:2005 Lab. Strong smell of alcohol and watery gel basis indicates 70% alcohol required to kill germs. The gel will spread nicely across the skin when applied. You only need a small amount to cover all of the hands. A little goes a long way. The canister at full capacity holds more than 5 litres. The product is filled to the 5 litre limit. Due to ullage regulations and packing rules regarding flammability you should expect a gap of several inches between the top of the canister and the liquid line.
